itinerary.sim: du Tourist SIM — about ₹1,495 for an airport-friendly tourist pack with enough data for maps, Careem, and attraction bookings across Dubai and Abu Dhabi.

Dubai City.name: Dubai City
Dubai City.note: Base yourself in central Dubai for the first half of the trip; Sharjah works best as a day trip before moving to Abu Dhabi.

days.theme: Downtown icons, skyline views, and an easy first-night Dubai reset

activities.name: Burj Khalifa At The Top entry
Dubai Mall browse and aquarium-facing promenade walk
Dubai Fountain and Burj Lake boardwalk
Dubai Frame sunset slot

days.theme: Old Dubai lanes, creekside markets, and classic neighborhoods

activities.name: Al Fahidi Historical Neighbourhood walk
Al Seef creekfront stroll
Gold Souk and Spice Souk browsing
Jumeirah Beach or Dubai Marina evening walk

days.theme: Desert safari thrills with a softer Palm and marina finish

activities.name: Half-day or evening desert safari with dune bashing and dinner
Palm Jumeirah boardwalk or The Pointe views
Madinat Jumeirah and Burj Al Arab photo stop
Bluewaters or Dubai Marina after-dark walk

Sharjah.name: Sharjah
Sharjah.note: Treat Sharjah as a day trip from Dubai, then return to the same Dubai hotel before moving onward.

days.theme: Heritage museums, Blue Souk browsing, and a lower-key emirate contrast to Dubai

activities.name: Dubai to Sharjah intercity bus or shared cab
Sharjah Museum of Islamic Civilization
Blue Souk and Corniche walk
Heart of Sharjah heritage district

Abu Dhabi.name: Abu Dhabi
Abu Dhabi.note: Plan two full Abu Dhabi city days plus one Al Ain day trip so the route lands at a complete 7-day UAE circuit.

days.theme: Grand mosque calm, cultural stops, and the capital’s cleaner waterfront pace

activities.name: Dubai to Abu Dhabi intercity bus
Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque
Louvre Abu Dhabi
Corniche and Etihad Towers viewpoint area walk

hotels.name: Premier Inn Abu Dhabi Capital Centre

days.theme: Yas Island headline attractions and a bigger-spend adventure day

activities.name: Ferrari World Abu Dhabi
Yas Bay Waterfront stroll

days.theme: Al Ain day trip for oasis greenery, forts, and Jebel Hafeet views

Al Ain Oasis
Jebel Hafeet viewpoints and mountain drive

hotels.name: Premier Inn Abu Dhabi Capital Centre

connections.method: Intercity bus or short shared cab for the museum-and-souk day trip
Return through Dubai, then continue by intercity bus to Abu Dhabi for the capital stay

extras: This route is easiest as a 7-day UAE sampler: 3 nights in Dubai, a Sharjah day trip, then 3 nights in Abu Dhabi with Al Ain as the long day excursion.
Hotel pricing usually lands between ₹4,600 and ₹11,500 per night in reliable chain stays like Rove Downtown, ibis, and Premier Inn, with weekends and big events pushing rates up.
Careem is the simplest backup when metro and buses slow down, especially for late desert safari returns or Al Ain day-trip logistics.
HappyCow is useful if you want vegetarian-friendly planning around Saravana Bhavan and Govinda's, while Ravi Restaurant stays one of the easiest casual Pakistani/Indian meal stops in Dubai.
Book Burj Khalifa sunset slots, desert safaris, Ferrari World, and Louvre Abu Dhabi ahead on Klook or official sites during winter because November to March is peak season.
